theme: Build target numbers using only additions
title: Monotone Register Ratchet: Minimal Addition Program for a Target Set
strategies: per-target independent binary double-and-add chains, no sharing (trivial)
adjacent-pair gcd sharing, commit to the shared base immediately, no replanning (greedy)
global pairwise-gcd mining + deferred commitment (build independents first so the shared doubling ladder is born with a large ratchet budget) + rebuild-on-exhaustion (strong)
true minimum-instruction ensemble/Steiner addition-chain schedule (open ceiling, uncovered)
